barRaise.topFinding: The cohort cleared this cycle: the 13-file release batch that sat uncommitted for four straight runs has shipped (v0.13.2 at HEAD da2dbf2), the brand rename landed in canon titles, and the tree is clean except one CHANGELOG.md backfill. The P0 .finances/ history scrub finally exists in the queue, closing last run's declined-enqueue gap. What has not moved is the one finding that matters: real bank statements remain fetchable from pushed public git history (44b7b10, f670d17, 43ea16b), now carried across nine audits, a direct violation of the local-only invariant. The scrub tooling is staged and dry-run-safe; it needs one human git filter-repo plus force-push. Everything else is low-grade residue: gitignored .bak/_tmp clutter, a public landing page still on the old brand, and the archived keytar boot-path dependency. Verdict holds at needs-attention but the trajectory is positive.
